text: U.S. Central Command Sailors aboard aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) serve meals to crew members. A typical aircraft carrier strike group serves around 4,000 eggs daily. Three aircraft carrier strike groups are currently operating in the Middle East. Combined, the Sailors and Marines from these units consume over 12,000 eggs each day. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰（CVN 72）上的水兵们为船员提供餐食。一个典型的航母打击群每天供应约4000个鸡蛋。目前有三个航母打击群在中东地区执行任务。这些部队的水兵和海军陆战队员合计每天消耗超过12000个鸡蛋。推文

text: 🇹🇭 🇺🇸 A U.S. Navy chief crewman was attacked by a monkey while the ship was refueling in Phuket, Thailand, en route to the Strait of Hormuz. The sailor was medically evacuated to Japan for further treatment. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇹🇭 🇺🇸 一名美国海军首席船员在泰国普吉岛加油时遭到猴子袭击，当时该舰正前往霍尔木兹海峡。这名水手已被医疗后送至日本接受进一步治疗。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🇮🇷 Large crowds continue to take part in nightly rallies across Iran, voicing support for the Islamic Republic and the Iranian Armed Forces. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗各地夜间集会持续，大批民众参与其中，表达对伊朗伊斯兰共和国和伊朗武装部队的支持。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender A U.S. Special Forces Soldier involved in Operation Absolute Resolve, the capture in January of Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro, has been arrested by federal agents and charged for allegedly betting on the operation via the prediction market platform Polymarket, netting him $400,000 in profits, according to CNN. The Soldier, identified as Master Sergeant Gannon Ken Van Dyke, an active-duty senior enlisted servicemember stationed at Fort Bragg, North Carolina, opened an account in late December on Polymarket. Betting a total of approximately $33,034 in 13 bets from December 27, 2025, through the evening of January 2, some only hours before the overnight operation to capture Maduro. Federal authorities state that Van Dyke “participated in the planning and execution of the U.S. military operation to capture Nicolás Maduro,” being charged with “unlawful use of confidential government information for personal gain, theft of nonpublic government information, commodities fraud, wire fraud, and making an unlawful monetary transaction.” tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender 据CNN报道，一名参与“绝对决心行动”（Operation Absolute Resolve，即1月份抓捕委内瑞拉总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗的行动）的美国特种部队士兵已被联邦特工逮捕，并被指控涉嫌通过预测市场平台Polymarket对该行动进行投注，获利40万美元。这名士兵被确认为加农·肯·范戴克（Gannon Ken Van Dyke）军士长，他是驻扎在北卡罗来纳州布拉格堡的现役高级士官，于12月下旬在Polymarket开设了账户。从2025年12月27日到1月2日晚，他在13次投注中总共投入了约33,034美元，其中一些投注距离抓捕马杜罗的夜间行动仅有数小时。联邦当局称，范戴克“参与了美国抓捕尼古拉斯·马杜罗军事行动的策划和执行”，被控“非法利用政府机密信息谋取个人利益、窃取非公开政府信息、商品欺诈、电信欺诈以及进行非法货币交易”。推文

text: Open Source Intel DOJ: U.S. soldier Gannon Ken Van Dyke charged with using classified information to win $400K+ betting on Nicolás Maduro’s removal; faces up to 60 years in prison, prosecutors seeking to seize proceeds. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047448226664444027/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国司法部：美国士兵加农·肯·范戴克因利用机密信息在尼古拉斯·马杜罗被捕事件中投注获利40多万美元而被起诉；面临最高60年监禁，检察官正寻求没收其非法所得。由 @AZ_Intel_ 贡献。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047448226664444027/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) REPORTER: Apparently there was a special forces soldier who was involved in the capture of Venezuelan President Maduro, who was arrested by federal authorities today on suspicion of insider trading and betting on polymarket. US PRESIDENT TRUMP: Was he betting that they would get him or they wouldn't get him? tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻） 记者：显然有一名参与抓捕委内瑞拉总统马杜罗的特种部队士兵，今天因涉嫌内幕交易和在Polymarket上投注而被联邦当局逮捕。美国总统特朗普：他是押注他们能抓到他，还是抓不到他？推文

text: Javier Milei, the President of Argentina, is still in Israel. He has left the Western Wall and is now eating cake with the Israeli president.
text_zh: 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱目前仍在以色列。他已经离开了西墙，现在正与以色列总统一起吃蛋糕。

text: 🇺🇸 BREAKING! A US Army Special Forces soldier who participated in the kidnapping of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro has been arrested and charged with betting on the outcome of his own mission. Master Sergeant Gannon Ken Van Dyke opened a Polymarket account in late December and wagered $32,000 that Maduro would be "out" by January — netting $400,000 in profit. The unusually large trade flagged by law enforcement led directly to his exposure. Van Dyke was indicted Thursday in connection with "Operation Absolute Resolve." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 突发！一名参与绑架委内瑞拉总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗的美国陆军特种部队士兵已被逮捕，并被指控对其自身任务的结果进行赌博。军士长加农·肯·范戴克（Gannon Ken Van Dyke）在12月下旬开设了一个Polymarket账户，并下注3.2万美元赌马杜罗将在1月“下台”——最终获利40万美元。执法部门发现这一异常巨额交易，直接导致其身份暴露。范戴克周四因与“绝对决心行动”（Operation Absolute Resolve）有关而被起诉。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇷🇺U.S. President Trump on reports that he has invited Russian President Putin to the G20 in Miami: Reporter: "Some reports say sort of that you're doing a student by to g 20 in Miami. Is that the case?" Trump: "No. But if he came, it would be probably…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State Rubio on Iran's soccer team entering the U.S. for the World Cup. "There's nothing from The US has told them they can't come. I mean, the problem with Iran, it would be not their athletes. It would be some of the other people that we wanna bring with them, some of whom have ties to the IRGC. We may not be able to let them in, but not the athletes themselves. But no one's I don't know where that's coming from other than speculation that Iran may decide not to come and Italy would fill their spot. But that's they decide not to come on their own because they decided not to come. What they can't bring is a bunch of IRGC terrorists into our country." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇷🇺美国总统特朗普回应有关他邀请俄罗斯总统普京参加迈阿密G20峰会的报道：记者：“有报道称你正在迈阿密举办G20峰会。是这样吗？”特朗普：“不。但如果他来了，那可能会……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国务卿卢比奥谈及伊朗足球队进入美国参加世界杯。“美国没有任何规定说他们不能来。我的意思是，伊朗的问题不在于他们的运动员。而在于我们想要随他们一同入境的其他一些人，其中一些人与伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）有联系。我们可能无法让他们入境，但运动员本身是可以的。没人——我不知道这些说法从何而来，除了猜测伊朗可能决定不来，然后由意大利填补他们的空缺。但那是他们自己决定不来，因为他们决定不来。他们不能带一堆伊斯兰革命卫队的恐怖分子进入我们的国家。” @wfwitness

text: Argentina's President Javier Milei: Marx was a Satanist. Marxism is a satanic theory, a program opposed to God’s program.
text_zh: 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱：马克思是撒旦崇拜者。马克思主义是一种撒旦理论，是一个与上帝计划背道而驰的纲领。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump says the U.S. has complete control over the Strait of Hormuz. "We have complete control. Now they can drop their minds in there and do all those stupid things. It's just gonna take longer for them to make money because the minds…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 U.S. President Trump on reports that he has invited Russian President Putin to the G20 in Miami: Reporter: "Some reports say sort of that you're doing a student by to g 20 in Miami. Is that the case?" Trump: "No. But if he came, it would be probably very helpful. You know, I've said a long time ago when they made the g eight, the g seven, they threw Russia out before my time. That was Obama and a certain prime minister from a place called Canada, Strudeau. And I said that that's a stupid thing to do." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普表示，美国完全控制了霍尔木兹海峡。“我们拥有完全的控制权。现在他们可以在那里投放水雷并做所有那些愚蠢的事情。这只会让他们赚钱的时间变长，因为水雷……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 美国总统特朗普回应有关他邀请俄罗斯总统普京参加迈阿密G20峰会的报道：记者：“有报道称你正在迈阿密举办G20峰会。是这样吗？”特朗普：“不。但如果他来了，那可能会非常有帮助。你知道，很久以前当他们组建G8、G7时，在我任期之前就把俄罗斯踢出去了。那是奥巴马和来自加拿大那个叫斯特鲁多（Strudeau）的地方的某位总理干的。我说过那是一件愚蠢的事情。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧U.S. President Trump says that the Lebanese law banning contact with Israel has to come to an end. "I think we have to end that. Yeah. Okay. That's something we're gonna have to end. I've never heard of that, but that's a good start. It's a crime…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says the U.S. has complete control over the Strait of Hormuz. "We have complete control. Now they can drop their minds in there and do all those stupid things. It's just gonna take longer for them to make money because the minds are gonna affect them much more than they're gonna affect us. But, and we don't know that they're doing that, but they could be that they're if they if they're doing it, it's a very foolish thing to do." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧美国总统特朗普表示，黎巴嫩禁止与以色列接触的法律必须终结。“我认为我们必须结束它。是的。好的。那是我们必须结束的事情。我从未听说过这个，但这是一个好的开始。这是一种犯罪……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国完全控制了霍尔木兹海峡。“我们拥有完全的控制权。现在他们可以在那里投放水雷并做所有那些愚蠢的事情。这只会让他们赚钱的时间变长，因为水雷对他们的影响远大于对我们的影响。但是，我们不知道他们是否在这样做，但他们可能会——如果他们正在这样做，那是非常愚蠢的行为。” @wfwitness

Iranian FM Aragachi: The failure of Israel's terrorist killings is reflected in how Iran's state institutions continue to act with unity, purpose, and discipline. The battlefield and diplomacy are fully coordinated fronts in the same war. Iranians are all united, more than ever before. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗外长称“我们团结一致”，是的，是的，伊斯兰革命卫队扼住了所有人的喉咙。每个人都知道。拿枪的人说了算。伊朗外长阿拉格齐：以色列恐怖暗杀的失败反映在伊朗国家机构如何继续保持团结、目标明确和纪律严明地运作。战场和外交是同一场战争中完全协调的战线。伊朗人比以往任何时候都更加团结。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid : 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 💣 Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) navy laid more mines in the Strait of Hormuz in recent days, according to a U.S. official and a source with knowledge of the issue. Read the story by @MarcACaputo and me on @axios https://www.axios.com/2026/04/23/iran-strait-hormuz-mines-trump tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @BarakRavid ： 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 💣 据一名美国官员和一位知情人士透露，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）海军近日在霍尔木兹海峡布设了更多水雷。阅读 @MarcACaputo 和我关于 @axios 的报道 https://www.axios.com/2026/04/23/iran-strait-hormuz-mines-trump 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT WarTranslated The European Union has adopted its 20th sanctions package against Russia today. Here is what it includes: 🔹 A blow to the energy sector - new restrictions on oil, the "shadow fleet" and 46 tankers, a ban on operations with the ports of Murmansk and Tuapse; 🔹 Finance under pressure - sanctions against 20 Russian banks and the crypto sector, including a complete ban on Russian crypto platforms; 🔹 The Russian defense industry - restrictions on 58 companies and suppliers from third countries (China, the UAE, etc.); 🔹 Trade - new bans on the export of technologies and goods (for €360 million) and the import of Russian raw materials (for €570 million); 🔹 Separately - restrictions against Kyrgyzstan due to the risk of re-exporting goods to Russia; 🔹 LNG and ships - restrictions on the servicing of LNG tankers and new rules for the sale of ships; 🔹 Belarus - new sanctions against the defense industry and mirror restrictions against Russia. In total - 120 new sanctions positions and the largest package in two years. https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/press/press-releases/2026/04/23/russia-s-war-of-aggression-against-ukraine-20th-round-of-stern-eu-sanctions-hits-energy-military-industrial-complex-trade-and-financial-services-including-crypto/ tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT WarTranslated 欧盟今天通过了第20轮对俄制裁方案。内容包括：🔹 对能源部门的打击——对石油、“影子船队”和46艘油轮实施新限制，禁止与摩尔曼斯克港和图阿普谢港进行业务往来；🔹 金融承压——对20家俄罗斯银行和加密货币行业实施制裁，包括全面禁止俄罗斯加密货币平台；🔹 俄罗斯国防工业——对来自第三国（中国、阿联酋等）的58家公司和供应商实施限制；🔹 贸易——禁止出口技术和商品（价值3.6亿欧元）以及进口俄罗斯原材料（价值5.7亿欧元）的新禁令；🔹 单独列出——由于存在将商品转口至俄罗斯的风险，对吉尔吉斯斯坦实施限制；🔹 液化天然气（LNG）和船舶——限制液化天然气油轮的服务以及船舶销售的新规则；🔹 白俄罗斯——对国防工业实施新制裁，并对俄罗斯实施对等限制。总计——120项新制裁条款，这是两年来规模最大的一揽子方案。https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/press/press-releases/2026/04/23/russia-s-war-of-aggression-against-ukraine-20th-round-of-stern-eu-sanctions-hits-energy-military-industrial-complex-trade-and-financial-services-including-crypto/ 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪🇸🇦🇷🇺U.S. President Trump says that the U.S. doesn't have an oil shortage, and that they're producing more oil than Saudi Arabia and Russia combined. That's something we're gonna have to end. I've never heard of that, but that's a good start. It's a crime to talk with Israel. Well, I'm pretty sure that that'll be ended very quickly." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪🇸🇦🇷🇺美国总统特朗普表示，美国没有石油短缺，而且美国的石油产量超过了沙特阿拉伯和俄罗斯的总和。“我们没有石油短缺。我们有‘钻探，宝贝，钻探’。我们现在生产的石油……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 美国总统特朗普表示，黎巴嫩禁止与以色列接触的法律必须终结。“我认为我们必须结束它。是的。好的。那是我们必须结束的事情。我从未听说过那个，但那是一个好的开始。与以色列交谈是犯罪。嗯，我很确定那会很快结束。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 WSJ: The U.S. has expended so many munitions in Iran that some administration officials now assess America could not fully execute contingency plans to defend Taiwan against a Chinese invasion in the near term. Since the war with Iran began on Feb. 28, the U.S. has fired over 1,000 Tomahawk cruise missiles and 1,500-2,000 air-defense interceptors, including THAAD, Patriot, and Standard Missiles, according to U.S. officials. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 《华尔街日报》：美国在伊朗消耗了大量弹药，以至于一些政府官员现在评估，美国在短期内可能无法完全执行保卫台湾免受中国入侵的应急计划。据美国官员称，自2月28日与伊朗的战争开始以来，美国已经发射了超过1000枚战斧巡航导弹和1500-2000枚防空拦截导弹，包括萨德（THAAD）、爱国者和标准导弹。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump on if he is worried U.S. officials are gambling on prediction markets on the conflict with Iran. "Unfortunately, it's become somewhat of a you know? Happening on these bridge markets around the war. Are you concerned? Well, you…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 🇸🇦 🇷🇺 U.S. President Trump says that the U.S. doesn't have an oil shortage, and that they're producing more oil than Saudi Arabia and Russia combined. "We don't have an oil shortage. We have we drill baby drill. We we are right now producing more oil than Saudi Arabia and Russia combined. Did you know that? More and in about a year from now, we'll be doing double the the level. And Venezuela has been fantastic. We have a great relationship with that country and with the people that are running the country. And we're taking out we're taking in millions of barrels of oil, millions and millions from Venezuela. It's been a great experience, to be honest with you, and they're doing a very good job, and they have our backing." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普谈及是否担心美国官员在预测市场上对伊朗冲突进行赌博。“不幸的是，它已经变得有点……你知道吗？在这些围绕战争的桥牌市场上发生。你担心吗？嗯，你……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 🇸🇦 🇷🇺 美国总统特朗普表示，美国没有石油短缺，而且美国的石油产量超过了沙特阿拉伯和俄罗斯的总和。“我们没有石油短缺。我们有‘钻探，宝贝，钻探’。我们现在生产的石油超过了沙特阿拉伯和俄罗斯的总和。你知道吗？更多，而且大约一年后，我们将达到两倍的水平。委内瑞拉一直很棒。我们与那个国家以及管理那个国家的人民有着良好的关系。我们正在从委内瑞拉进口数百万桶石油，数百万又数百万。老实说，这是一次很棒的经历，他们做得非常好，而且他们有我们的支持。” @wfwitness

text_zh: 特朗普计划邀请普京参加12月在迈阿密举行的G20峰会。来源：《华盛顿邮报》

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪U.S. President Trump on the U.S. Special Forces soldier who was recently arrested for betting on the removal of former Venezuelan President Maduro on prediction markets. Trump: "Well, I don't know about it, but, was he betting that they would get him…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on if he is worried U.S. officials are gambling on prediction markets on the conflict with Iran. "Unfortunately, it's become somewhat of a you know? Happening on these bridge markets around the war. Are you concerned? Well, you know, the whole world, unfortunately, has become somewhat of a casino. And you look at what's going on all over the world, in Europe, and every place they're doing these betting things. I was never much in favor of it. I don't like it conceptually, but, it is what it is. No. I think that I'm not happy with any of that stuff, but, they have all these different sites. They have predictive markets. It's a crazy world. It's a much different world than it was." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪美国总统特朗普谈及最近因在预测市场上押注罢免前委内瑞拉总统马杜罗而被捕的美国特种部队士兵。特朗普：“嗯，我不知道这件事，但是，他是在赌他们会抓住他……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈及是否担心美国官员在预测市场上对伊朗冲突进行赌博。“不幸的是，它已经变得有点……你知道吗？在这些围绕战争的桥牌市场上发生。你担心吗？嗯，你知道，不幸的是，整个世界已经变得有点像赌场了。你看看世界各地正在发生的事情，在欧洲，到处都在进行这些赌博活动。我从来都不太赞成它。从概念上讲我不喜欢它，但事实就是这样。不。我想我对所有这些事情都不高兴，但他们有所有这些不同的网站。他们有预测市场。这是一个疯狂的世界。这是一个与过去完全不同的世界。” @wfwitness

text: A U.S. special forces soldier was arrested for allegedly using inside information from a secret mission to capture Nicolás Maduro to place bets on a prediction market, making over $400,000 profit. He reportedly bet about $32–33K on Maduro being removed from power just before the operation. Source: CNN
text_zh: 一名美国特种部队士兵因涉嫌利用抓捕尼古拉斯·马杜罗的秘密任务的内幕信息在预测市场上进行投注，获利超过40万美元而被捕。据报道，他在行动前不久押注了约3.2万至3.3万美元，赌马杜罗会被赶下台。来源：CNN

text: Reporter: Do you think peace between Lebanon and Israel will happen this year? Trump: I think there is a great chance.
text_zh: 记者：你认为黎巴嫩和以色列之间的和平今年会实现吗？特朗普：我认为有很大的机会。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇱🇧🇮🇷U.S. President Trump says that Iran must cut off all funding to Hezbollah to make a deal with him. Reporter: "Sir, the funding that has only gets from Iran. Is Iran gonna have to cut that off to do a deal with him?" Trump: "Yeah. They'll have to…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 U.S. President Trump on the U.S. Special Forces soldier who was recently arrested for betting on the removal of former Venezuelan President Maduro on prediction markets. Trump: "Well, I don't know about it, but, was he betting that they would get him or they wouldn't get him?" Reporter: "It sounds like he was betting on his removal from office, that Bandura would be removed. It sounds like he was involved in the operation." Trump: "That's like Pete Rose betting on his own team. It sounds like Pete Rose. Pete Rose, they kept him out of the hall of fame because he bet on his own team. Now if he bet against his team, that would be no good, but he bet on his own team. I'll look into it." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇱🇧🇮🇷美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗必须切断对真主党的所有资助，才能与他达成协议。记者：“先生，真主党获得的资助仅来自伊朗。伊朗是否必须切断这些资助才能与您达成协议？”特朗普：“是的。他们必须……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 美国总统特朗普谈及最近因在预测市场上押注委内瑞拉前总统马杜罗下台而被捕的美国特种部队士兵。特朗普：“嗯，我不太了解这件事，但他是在押注他们会抓住他，还是不会抓住他？”记者：“听起来他是在押注马杜罗会被免职。听起来他参与了这次行动。”特朗普：“这就像皮特·罗斯（Pete Rose）押注自己的球队一样。听起来就像皮特·罗斯。皮特·罗斯因为押注自己的球队而被禁止进入名人堂。如果他押注自己的球队输，那倒没什么，但他押注的是自己的球队。我会调查这件事。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: Mines are going to affect Iran much more than they are going to affect us. We don’t know if they are doing that, but they could be.
text_zh: 特朗普：地雷对伊朗的影响远大于对我们的影响。我们不知道他们是否在这样做，但他们有可能。

text: Reporter: On Monday, you said there was a gift for the Iranians in the Chinese ship. What was in that ship? Trump: Yeah, well, we have that. It’s very top secret. There was stuff in there, but it’s top secret.
text_zh: 记者：周一您说中国船只里有给伊朗人的礼物。那艘船里有什么？特朗普：是的，嗯，我们有那个。那是绝密的。里面确实有东西，但那是绝密的。

text: Reporter: A special forces soldier who was involved in the capture of Maduro was arrested on suspicion of insider trading. Trump: Was he betting that they would get him or wouldn’t get him?... I will look into it.
text_zh: 记者：一名参与抓捕马杜罗的特种部队士兵因涉嫌内幕交易被捕。特朗普：他是在押注他们会抓住他还是不会抓住他？……我会调查这件事。

text: Trump: Anytime you have mail-in ballots, you have cheating.
text_zh: 特朗普：任何时候只要有邮寄选票，就会有舞弊。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Origin of Iran's 'imaginary nuclear bomb' claim is Israel — Iran MFA Spox Baqaei. While “Zionist regime is only possessor of nukes in the region”. “This claim really needs to be put aside”. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 伊朗外交部发言人巴盖伊称，伊朗所谓“虚构核弹”的说法源于以色列。同时称“犹太复国主义政权是该地区唯一的核武器拥有者”。“这种说法真的应该被抛弃”。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Trump: They are finding out that the 2020 election was totally rigged.
text_zh: 特朗普：他们正在发现2020年大选完全是被操纵的。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧🇸🇦U.S. President Trump on Saudi Arabian involvement in a peace deal between Israel and Lebanon: "Well, Saudi Arabia is great, and they have a great leader. And I think that, they'd be very happy with this. I haven't spoken to them. Will. This happened…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says that Iran must cut off all funding to Hezbollah to make a deal with him. Reporter: "Sir, the funding that has only gets from Iran. Is Iran gonna have to cut that off to do a deal with him?" Trump: "Yeah. They'll have to cut that." Reporter: "That's a must for you." Trump: "Yeah. Sure. That's a must. Yeah." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧🇸🇦美国总统特朗普谈及沙特阿拉伯参与以色列与黎巴嫩之间的和平协议：“嗯，沙特阿拉伯很棒，他们有一位伟大的领导人。我认为他们会对这个结果非常高兴。我还没有和他们谈过。会谈的。这发生得很快……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗必须切断对真主党的所有资助，才能与他达成协议。记者：“先生，真主党获得的资助仅来自伊朗。伊朗是否必须切断这些资助才能与您达成协议？”特朗普：“是的。他们必须切断这些资助。”记者：“这对您来说是必须的吗？”特朗普：“是的。当然。那是必须的。是的。” @wfwitness

text: Reporter: What do you think about replacing Iran with Italy at the World Cup? Trump: Let me give that a little thought. Marco? Marco Rubio: There is nothing from the U.S. saying that they can't come.
text_zh: 记者：您认为用意大利取代伊朗参加世界杯怎么样？特朗普：让我考虑一下。马可？马可·鲁比奥：美国没有任何说法说他们不能来。

text: Faytuks News Remember: Trump posted this on his Truth social earlier https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2047434534375903727/photo/1 US military planners are reportedly developing options to strike Iranian military leaders and other “obstructionists” within the regime who US officials have suggested are actively undermining negotiations -CNN Ahmad Vahidi, commander of the IRGC, is reportedly on the list. - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 提醒：特朗普早些时候在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上发布了这条消息 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2047434534375903727/photo/1 据报道，美国军事规划人员正在制定方案，以打击伊朗军事领导人及政权内部其他“阻挠者”，美国官员暗示这些人正在积极破坏谈判 - CNN 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队指挥官艾哈迈德·瓦希迪（Ahmad Vahidi）据称在名单上。 - OSINTtechnical 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has said that during today’s meeting with Israeli and Lebanese officials it was decided that the ceasefire (not to be confused with the U.S.-Iran ceasefire) will be extended for 3 weeks. President Trump, Vice President JD Vance, Secretary of State Marco Rubio, Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee, and Ambassador to Lebanon Michel Issa met with Israeli and Lebanese officials during today’s meeting, the last day before the ceasefire in Lebanon was set to expire. Additionally, the president said that he looks to host both Israeli President Benjamin Netanyahu and Lebanese President Joseph Aoun at the White House in the near future. A meeting that would be the first in decades. However, it should be noted that mere minutes before the meeting’s start, both Lebanese Hezbollah and Israel exchanged strikes. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，在今天与以色列和黎巴嫩官员的会议中，决定将停火协议（不要与美伊停火协议混淆）延长3周。特朗普总统、副总统JD·万斯、国务卿马可·鲁比奥、驻以色列大使迈克·赫卡比和驻黎巴嫩大使米歇尔·伊萨在今天（黎巴嫩停火协议到期前的最后一天）与以色列和黎巴嫩官员举行了会晤。此外，总统表示，他期待在不久的将来在白宫接待以色列总统本雅明·内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩。这将是几十年来首次此类会晤。然而，值得注意的是，在会议开始前几分钟，黎巴嫩真主党和以色列双方交换了火力。 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump suggests Netanyahu and the President of Lebanon will meet in the Oval Office within three weeks. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047429334881763410/video/1 tweet
